title: calliandra pauciflora subsp. nipensis
intro: Calliandra pauciflora subsp. nipensis is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the powder puff bush. It is a tropical plant native to the Caribbean, particularly in the Bahamas, where it grows as a shrub or small tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calliandra pauciflora subsp. nipensis include wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory issues, which can be achieved through various herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves.
